title: Text Leveler
description: Rewrite any passage at a different reading level, with key vocabulary.
template: Rewrite the following passage for {targetGradeLevel}: {passage}. Keep all key facts and the original meaning — do not add information that isn't in the original. After the rewrite, list 5 key vocabulary words from the passage with student-friendly definitions. Do not include any student names or identifying details.

fields.label: Passage
fields.placeholder: Paste the passage to level here.
